TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qalang_Pyaway_жҜ”дәһеӨ–, title = qalang_Pyaway_жҜ”дәһеӨ–, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qalang_Pyaway_жҜ”дәһеӨ–} }

S.FORM: Yuma еҸЈиҝ° Hayung Sugiy зҙҖйҢ„ === qalang Pyaway qani ga muci balay squ knitan ga, nanu yasa qu ini ptnaq squ kwara squ qalang binah nqu qalang qani. nanu yasa qu aring raral qani ga, bnkis qani ga wal i smi balay squ inlungan ru inrasan nqu a qalang Pyaway ru pcbaq squ laqi ka bnkis. nanu yasa qu cingay qu bnkis qani lga nanu wal mhoqil kwara la, aring squ е®Ӣзү§её« ru kwara squ иҖҒеё«жҜҚ qani lga, si say mha ini ktwa qu bnkis ka nyux mqyanux squ Pyaway qani la. nanu yasa qu trang squ mrkyas cikay squ laqi qani ga, nanu cbaqan sami nqu bnkis musa i tmubux squ trakis, ===

Yuma еҸЈиҝ° Hayung Sugiy зҙҖйҢ„ === qalang Pyaway qani ga muci balay squ knitan ga, nanu yasa qu ini ptnaq squ kwara squ qalang binah nqu qalang qani. nanu yasa qu aring raral qani ga, bnkis qani ga wal i smi balay squ inlungan ru inrasan nqu a qalang Pyaway ru pcbaq squ laqi ka bnkis. nanu yasa qu cingay qu bnkis qani lga nanu wal mhoqil kwara la, aring squ е®Ӣзү§её« ru kwara squ иҖҒеё«жҜҚ qani lga, si say mha ini ktwa qu bnkis ka nyux mqyanux squ Pyaway qani la. nanu yasa qu trang squ mrkyas cikay squ laqi qani ga, nanu cbaqan sami nqu bnkis musa i tmubux squ trakis, ===
S.PHON: juma ** Д§ajuЕӢ s~Й•uЙЈij ** === qalaЕӢ pjawaj qani ЙЈa muКҰ~КЁi ОІalaj s~Й•qu knitan ЙЈa, nanu jas~Й•a qu ini ptnaq s~Й•qu kwara s~Й•qu qalaЕӢ ОІinaД§ nqu qalaЕӢ qani. nanu jas~Й•a qu ariЕӢ raral qani ЙЈa, ОІnkis~Й• qani ЙЈa wal i s~Й•mi ОІalaj s~Й•qu inluЕӢan ru inras~Й•an nqu a qalaЕӢ pjawaj ru pКҰ~КЁОІaq s~Й•qu laqi ka ОІnkis~Й•. nanu jas~Й•a qu КҰ~КЁiЕӢaj qu ОІnkis~Й• qani lЙЈa nanu wal mД§oqil kwara la, ariЕӢ s~Й•qu *** ru kwara s~Й•qu *** qani lЙЈa, s~Й•i s~Й•aj mД§a ini ktwa qu ОІnkis~Й• ka njux mqjanux s~Й•qu pjawaj qani la. nanu jas~Й•a qu traЕӢ s~Й•qu mrkjas~Й• КҰ~КЁikaj s~Й•qu laqi qani ЙЈa, nanu КҰ~КЁОІaqan s~Й•ami nqu ОІnkis~Й• mus~Й•a i tmuОІux s~Й•qu trakis~Й•, ===
